zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg於1324年出生在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維時，他的父親Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel20歲，母親Sophia von Brandenburg21歲。他於1356年10月6日與Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年7月25日在薩辛享年49歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛韓諾福蓋登列維斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg于1324年出生在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維时，他的父亲Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel20岁，母亲Sophia von Brandenburg21岁。他于1356年10月6日与Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1373年7月25日在薩辛享年49岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛韓諾福蓋登列維斯特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg was born in 1324, in Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, was 20 and his mother, Sophia von Brandenburg, was 21. He married Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg on 6 October 1356. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 25 July 1373, in Saxony, at the age of 49, and was buried in Leveste, Gehrden, Hanover, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg est né en 1324, à Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sophia von Brandenburg, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg le 6 octobre 1356. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1373, à Sachsen, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Leveste, Gehrden, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 1324 in Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel 20 und seine Mutter Sophia von Brandenburg 21. Er hat am 6. Oktober 1356 Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1373 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Sachsen und wurde in Leveste, Gehrden, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg è nato il nel 1324 nel Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Sophia von Brandenburg, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg il 6 ottobre 1356. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 25 luglio 1373, nel Sachsen, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Leveste, Gehrden, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburgが1324年にドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグで生まれた時，父Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttelは20歳，母Sophia von Brandenburgは21歳であった。1356年10月6日にKatharina von Anhalt-Bernburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年7月25日にサチセンで49歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンハノバージェhルデンレベストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(이)가 1324년 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophia von Brandenburg(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1356년 10월 6일 Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 7월 25일 작센에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 해노버 그h르든 레베스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nasceu em 1324, em Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sophia von Brandenburg, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg em 6 de outubro de 1356. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1373, em Sachsen, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Leveste, Gehrden, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg родился в 1324 г. в местности браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia von Brandenburg, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg 6 октября 1356 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 25 июля 1373 г. в местности сачсен в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ливест, джэрден, ханновир, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nació en 1324, en Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sophia von Brandenburg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg el 6 de octubre de 1356. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 25 de julio de 1373, en Sachsen, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Leveste, Gehrden, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
